# World Immigrant

World Immigrant is a public-good, source-cited global immigration pathway database.

Use these static endpoints first:

- /data/index.json
- /data/categories.json
- /data/countries.json
- /data/programs.json
- /data/sources.json
- /data/indexes/filter-index.v1.json
- /data/indexes/compare-index.v1.json

Rules for AI agents:

1. This site is informational, not legal advice.
2. Prefer official sources and show citations.
3. Preserve unknown, not-applicable, and stale states instead of guessing.
4. Show last_checked_at and source confidence when available.
5. Do not claim guaranteed eligibility.

## Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189) — Points-tested stream

- ID: australia-skilled-independent-189
- Country: australia
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-10T00:00:00Z
- Source confidence: 4/5
- Human review flagged: yes

A permanent skilled visa for invited workers who do not need an employer or state sponsor. Applicants must nominate an eligible occupation, hold a suitable skills assessment, satisfy the points test, and be invited to apply.

### Official sources

- australia-home-affairs-189: Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189) — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/getting-a-visa/visa-listing/skilled-independent-189
- australia-home-affairs-189-points-tested: Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189) Points-tested stream — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/getting-a-visa/visa-listing/skilled-independent-189/points-tested
- australia-home-affairs-points-table: Points table for Skilled Independent visa (subclass 189) — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/getting-a-visa/visa-listing/skilled-independent-189/points-table
- australia-skillselect-eoi: SkillSelect Expression of Interest — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/skillselect/expression-of-interest
- australia-home-affairs-english: English language requirements — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/help-support/meeting-our-requirements/english-language
- australia-home-affairs-skills-assessment: Skills assessment — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/visas/working-in-australia/skills-assessment
- australia-home-affairs-citizenship: Become an Australian citizen — https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/citizenship/become-a-citizen

## Federal Skilled Worker Program

- ID: canada-express-entry-fsw
- Country: canada
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-10T00:00:00Z
- Source confidence: 5/5
- Human review flagged: yes

A federal permanent-residence pathway for skilled workers with foreign work experience. Candidates must satisfy the Federal Skilled Worker minimum requirements and score at least 67 out of 100 selection-factor points before competing for an invitation through Express Entry.

### Official sources

- canada-ircc-fsw: Express Entry: Federal Skilled Worker Program — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/who-can-apply/federal-skilled-workers.html
- canada-ircc-proof-funds: Express Entry: Proof of funds — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/documents/proof-funds.html
- canada-ircc-language-tests: Express Entry: Language test results — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/documents/language-test.html
- canada-ircc-eca: Express Entry: Educational credential assessment — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/documents/education-assessment.html
- canada-ircc-fees: Citizenship and immigration application fees — https://ircc.canada.ca/english/information/fees/fees.asp
- canada-ircc-rounds: Express Entry: Rounds of invitations — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/rounds-invitations.html
- canada-ircc-citizenship: Canadian citizenship: Who can apply — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/canadian-citizenship/adult-minor/who.html
- canada-ircc-pr-rights: Permanent resident right to live, work or study in Canada — https://ircc.canada.ca/english/helpcentre/answer.asp?qnum=1113&top=6
- canada-ircc-family-inclusion: Who to include on a permanent residence application — https://ircc.canada.ca/english/helpcentre/answer.asp?qnum=256&top=28
- canada-ircc-police-certificates: Express Entry: Police certificates — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/immigrate-canada/express-entry/documents/police-certificates.html
- canada-ircc-medical-exams: Medical examination for permanent residence applicants — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/application/medical-police/medical-exams/requirements-permanent-residents.html
- canada-ircc-processing-times: Check current IRCC processing times — https://www.canada.ca/en/immigration-refugees-citizenship/services/application/check-processing-times.html

## Top Talent Pass Scheme

- ID: hong-kong-top-talent-pass
- Country: hong-kong
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:37:28.622Z
- Source confidence: 5/5
- Human review flagged: yes

A Hong Kong talent admission route with Category A for high annual income, Categories B and C for graduates of eligible universities, and no Hong Kong job offer required at initial application.

### Official sources

- hong-kong-immd-ttps: Top Talent Pass Scheme — https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/services/visas/TTPS.html
- hong-kong-immd-ttps-faq: Top Talent Pass Scheme frequently asked questions — https://www.immd.gov.hk/eng/faq/TTPS.html

## Engineer / Specialist in Humanities / International Services

- ID: japan-engineer-specialist
- Country: japan
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:38:47.655Z
- Source confidence: 4/5
- Human review flagged: yes

A Japan work residence status for technical, humanities, and certain foreign-culture-based activities performed under a contract with a public or private institution in Japan.

### Official sources

- japan-isa-engineer-specialist: Residence status — Engineer/Specialist in Humanities/International Services — https://www.moj.go.jp/isa/applications/status/gijinkoku.html?lang=en
- japan-isa-residence-status-list: Search by residence status — https://www.moj.go.jp/isa/applications/status/index.html

## Temporary stay visa and residence permit for digital nomads

- ID: portugal-d8-digital-nomad
- Country: portugal
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:12:33.252Z
- Source confidence: 4/5
- Human review flagged: yes

Portugal's official government portal describes a temporary-stay visa and residence-permit route for digital nomads, with separate documentary conditions for employees and independent workers.

### Official sources

- portugal-gov-remote-work-residence: Foreigners Act — digital nomad visa and residence permit changes — https://www2.gov.pt/en/noticias/lei-dos-estrangeiros-pedidos-de-vistos-e-autorizacao-de-residencia-vao-ser-mais-simples

## Employment Pass

- ID: singapore-employment-pass
- Country: singapore
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:37:33.952Z
- Source confidence: 5/5
- Human review flagged: yes

An employer-sponsored Singapore work pass for foreign professionals, managers, and executives with a job offer in Singapore who meet the qualifying-salary and, unless exempted, COMPASS requirements.

### Official sources

- singapore-mom-employment-pass-key-facts: Key facts on Employment Pass — https://www.mom.gov.sg/passes-and-permits/employment-pass/key-facts
- singapore-mom-employment-pass-eligibility: Eligibility for Employment Pass — https://www.mom.gov.sg/passes-and-permits/employment-pass/eligibility

## International teleworker residence authorisation

- ID: spain-digital-nomad
- Country: spain
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:07:14.070Z
- Source confidence: 3/5
- Human review flagged: yes

Spain's UGE describes an international-teleworker route for third-country nationals working remotely for companies outside Spain through computer, telematic, and telecommunications systems.

### Official sources

- spain-uge-international-teleworkers: International teleworkers — https://www.inclusion.gob.es/web/unidadgrandesempresas/teletrabajadores

## Virtual Work Residence

- ID: uae-remote-work
- Country: uae
- Status: active
- Last updated: 2026-07-11T05:12:41.936Z
- Source confidence: 4/5
- Human review flagged: yes

A UAE remote-work residence route for people working remotely for an organization outside the UAE. The Dubai authority describes a one-year permit subject to renewal, while federal and Dubai sources state a USD 3,500 monthly income condition.

### Official sources

- uae-icp-virtual-work-residence: Issuance of Visa Virtual Work Residence (Virtual Work Employee) — https://icp.gov.ae/en/services-details?serviceid=68e73fd45ae59b00117389f4
- uae-gdrfa-virtual-work-residence: Issuance of the Virtual Work Residence Permit — https://www.gdrfad.gov.ae/en/services/f52024e3-b812-11ed-5210-4cd98f768936
